author: lOrm
content:
Deferred — requires unrestricted access to src/permissions.rs (FORBIDDEN under current cleanup scope).

**Fix outline:** The get-then-insert race in glob_to_regex_cached (src/permissions.rs:327-350) is fixed by collapsing the two lock acquisitions into one Entry API call: GLOB_CACHE.lock().entry(pattern.to_string()).or_insert_with(|| Regex::new(&Self::glob_to_regex(pattern)).ok())?.clone(). The regex compile happens at most once per pattern, the insert is atomic with the lookup, and double-compile waste disappears. Net: replace ~25 lines with ~6.

**Blocking:** src/permissions.rs is reserved scope.
